title: Record: 11L Gradient-Guided Adaptive Quant + EMA + Sliding Eval (val_bpb=1.1396)
body:
## Record: 11L Gradient-Guided Adaptive Quant + EMA + Sliding Eval (val_bpb: 1.1396)

**val_bpb: 1.1396** (sliding window, stride=64, full coverage) | **15.9 MB** | 8xH100 SXM, 600s

### Key Techniques

| Technique | Impact |
|-----------|--------|
| **Gradient-guided adaptive quantization** | Per-tensor int5/int6/int7 bit assignment based on gradient sensitivity. Top 45% get int7, middle 40% get int6, bottom 15% get int5. |
| **EMA from init** (alpha=0.997) | Exponential moving average tracking from initialization, loaded at eval time |
| **Adaptive warmdown** | Warmdown auto-caps at 55% of estimated total steps based on step timing, for robustness across hardware |
| **Sliding window eval** (stride=64) | Full validation set coverage (~121K windows/GPU), scoring only last 64 tokens per window |
| SmearGate | Residual mixing with learnable gate |
| NTK-aware RoPE | Rotary position encoding with NTK interpolation |
| XSA last 4 layers | Cross-sequence attention on final 4 transformer layers |
| Orthogonal init | Orthogonal weight initialization |
| Muon optimizer | momentum=0.99, WD=0.04, grad_clip=0.3 |

### Architecture

- 11 layers, 512 dim, 8 heads, 4 KV heads (GQA)
- MLP 3x expansion (hidden=1536), relu^2 activation
- Tied input/output embeddings
- 26.5M parameters

### Results

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Pre-quant val_bpb | 1.1339 |
| **Post-quant sliding val_bpb (s64)** | **1.1396** |
| Steps completed (600s cap) | 5,347 |
| Step time | 112ms |
| Model params | 26,502,232 |
| Artifact size | 15,913,419 bytes |
| Quant distribution | {int5: 12, int6: 31, int7: 36} |

### Run Command

```bash
pip install sentencepiece zstandard
python3 data/cached_challenge_fineweb.py
torchrun --nproc_per_node=8 records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-22_11L_GradQuant_EMA_SlidingEval/train_gpt.py
```

All hyperparameters baked into train_gpt.py. No env vars needed.
